title: Roadmap discussion
content:
User: We need to decide between shipping the analytics dashboard or the import pipeline next quarter.
Assistant: Both are valuable. The dashboard would give existing users immediate visibility into their data, while the import pipeline unblocks the enterprise tier we are pursuing. Given the sales motion, I would prioritize the import pipeline, but only if engineering capacity is confirmed for Q2.
User: Agreed. Let us plan to ship import in Q2 and revisit the dashboard at midyear review.
